_publications._publicationTitle: Local low-dose lovastatin delivery improves the bone-healing defect caused by Nf1 loss of function in osteoblasts.

_contextSnippet: This increase in callus volume was accompanied by an 18% decrease in both callus BV/TV and callus bridging cortices BV/TV (A, C Fig. 2)...
details: 18% decrease in both callus BV/TV and callus bridging cortices BV/TV at 21 days post-fracture
